summary: Fun 12‑song first set captured on a lively audience tape with a memorable Jerry guitar line behind Bob on “Take a Step Back”.
review: The show is remembered as a high‑energy party at a suburban baseball field, highlighted by a twelve‑song first set and a quirky Jerry melody under Bob’s “Take a Step Back”. The recording is an audience tape that fans enjoy for its atmosphere, though the reviewer rates the party more than the sound quality.

ai_rating.rationale: Only one enthusiastic review; strong praise for the performance but limited technical detail on recording quality.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Reviewer enjoys audience tapes and gives no specific complaints, indicating a decent but not pristine sound.

show_quality.setlist_flow: A fun, twelve‑song first set at a suburban baseball field created an upbeat party vibe that fans still recall fondly.

band_member_comments.Jerry: His guitar line behind Bob on “Take a Step Back” reminded the reviewer of R.M. Jordan’s “English Country Garden”.
band_member_comments.Bob: Lead vocals on “Take a Step Back”, noted for the interplay with Jerry’s guitar.
